channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Left over Seven Trent (!) signs on Andover Road, 5th April
item.description:
There are two abandoned signs for road works on the stretch of Andover Road between Andover Walk and Park Place. They have been there for ages and I’m not sure any works ever happened. If they are the property of Severn Trent it is mysterious that they have the company name misspelt!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 25, Andover Road, Tivoli, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Signs & Barriers left behind by Contractor

item.title: Large tree branch hanging off, 5th April
item.description:
Outside number 12
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 14, Kingsmead Avenue, Kingsditch, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Incomplete roadworks due to be finished by 27th March, incomplete, blocking my driveway and barriers blowing down. The issue has been present for approx 3 weeks., 5th April
item.description:
The problem is outside my house, 11 cherry blossom close, bishops Cleeve GL52 8XS.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 16, Cherry Blossom Close, Bishop's Cleeve
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Drain still blocked, 5th April
item.description:
This has been reported before. Drain is full of mud and overflows when it rains. Please don’t close case without actually unblocking this time :)
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 56, School Road, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Uneven section of road, 5th April
item.description:
On Cotswold Way, between Hartley Lane Car Park and Brownstones Quarry Car Park

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hartley Lane, Shurdington, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pothole, 5th April
item.description:
Outside Latheram house next to 43 Clarence street, Dangerous specialty after rain. This is a retirement home with 78 departments, a lot have wheel chairs making it more dangerous especially crossing the road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Albert Road, Marle Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pothole, 5th April
item.description:
Outside Latheram house next to 43 Clarence street, Dangerous specialty after rain. This is a retirement home with 78 departments, a lot have wheel chairs making it more dangerous especially crossing the road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Albert Road, Marle Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dangerous horses in field, 4th April
item.description:
Hi I would like to report an incident that occurred on a public right of way near a farm in Brockworth. Whilst walking my dog across a field a horse approached me and started pushing me with his head. They then started spinning and tried to kick me missing the first time but kicking me on my upper arm the second time. I was chased and broke in to a run to escape. I'm concerned that it is not safe for public to cross and may have a more serious outcome next time. What 3 words location ///bedrock.conqueror.lanes
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brockworth Road, Churchdown, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dining chair abandoned on verge, 4th April
item.description:
A chair is lying on the grass on the verge. It has been there for about three days.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 26, Bibury Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2 potholes at the bottom of the hill easily alter a car's direction coming down the hill., 4th April
item.description:
On the corner of Hartley lane approaching from the seven springs entrance, where it turns left and goes uphill.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hartley Lane, Coberley, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pothole, 4th April
item.description:
Approximately 75 yards from in front of the 'lambing shed, in the direction of seven springs roundabout along Hartley lane.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cirencester Road, Coberley, Cotswold

item.title: Deep potholes, 4th April
item.description:
100 yards from seven springs roundabout along Hartley lane.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hartley Lane, Coberley, Cotswold

item.title: 2 potholes not filled in, but identified with white paint around them., 4th April
item.description:
Both of these have white paint around them but were not dealt with when the adjacent holes were filled! The location is approximately 100yards heading from seven springs Hartley lane entrance along Hartley lane.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hartley Lane, Coberley, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole on Brighton Road next to 67, 4th April
item.description:
Pothole on Brighton Road, near 67 and the florist.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 67, Brighton Road, Fairview, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Volunteer litter pick bags ready for collection, 4th April
item.description:
Innsworth Lane Sports Ground, Longlevens. The 'What 3 Words' location is ///examiner.slopes.courage The ordnance survey map reference is: 51.883919,-2.213313 Council Litter Bin Ref: 0254 Volunteer litter pick bags ready for collection. Two bags, one containing general litter and the other cans/plastic bottles for recycling. Also one nitrous oxide cylinder.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Innsworth Lane, Longlevens, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Litter picking bags ready for collection

item.title: Potholes and depression on Hewlett Road, 4th April
item.description:
Two potholes and a larger dip/depression in the road, outside 65 Hewlett Road. Causing cars to bounce and needs addressing

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 65, Hewlett Road, Fairview, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wobbling slab at end of 6 Nettleton Road driveway, 4th April
item.description:
A wobbling/raised slab at the bottom of 6 Nettleton Road driveway (what three words motel.lied.horses). Needs to be repaired it is a trip hazard.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 6, Nettleton Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The footpath has been diverted quite a long and is not shown on the map. The indicated route is completely overgrown, blocked by a fence and the finger post has been removed., 4th April
item.description:
Footpath ZCH1 where it joins Hayden Road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hayden Road, Hesters Way, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Over grown into property, 4th April
item.description:
On the corner over village road and hayden Lane bedlam forge ... this tree has caused my elderly mother to fall break her pelvis as all the seasonal stuff that falls in to her garden..... very over grown into her property
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 16, Hayden Road, Kingsditch, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fence with nails protruding, 4th April
item.description:
There is a fence panel leaning into the footpath with nails protruding dangerously near head height.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 20, Noverton Avenue, Noverton, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
